scripts.build:tariff-prices: cd demos/tariff-prices && npm ci && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/tariffPrices && cp -r dist ../../public/tariffPrices
scripts.build:report-revenue: cd demos/report-revenue && npm ci && npm run build && rm -rf ../../public/reportRevenue && cp -r dist ../../public/reportRevenue
scripts.build:divisions: cd demos/divisions && npm ci && npm run build && cp public/mockServiceWorker.js dist/mockServiceWorker.js && rm -rf ../../public/divisions && cp -r dist ../../public/divisions
scripts.build:family-meals: cd ../family_meal-planning/frontend && npm ci && npm run build:demo && rm -rf ../../danilmakes/public/familyMeals && cp -r dist-demo/familyMeals ../../danilmakes/public/familyMeals
